questions.scenario: A dashboard scans five years of raw checkout events every minute to show yesterday's failures. What is the main design smell?

options.text: It scans far more data, far more often, than the question needs.
The data should be stored only on a VM disk.

questions.explanation: BigQuery cost and performance depend heavily on query scope and schedule.

questions.scenario: Most checkout reports filter by event date. Which table design habit helps BigQuery scan less unrelated data?

options.text: Partition by event date where appropriate.
Make every query select every column.

questions.explanation: Partition filters help limit the data a query scans.

questions.scenario: Which are healthy BigQuery cost habits?

options.text: Use modeled tables for common dashboards.

questions.explanation: Cost habits are part of warehouse design.
